rulings.Case Title: MANUEL ELAURIA et al VS. SUPERSHUTTLE INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 12, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANTS SUPERSHUTTLE INTERNATIONAL, INC., SUPERSHUTTLE SAN FRANCISCO, INC. D.B.A. SUPERSHUTTLE SAN FRANCISCO AND TOM LEVOY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 15, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: NEIL ADAMS VS. CORT BUSINESS SERVICES CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 12, 2008 LINE 2. CROSS-DEFENDANTS JEFF SEIDMAN, DAVE FLORY AND CORT BUSINESS SERVICES CORPORATION'S, D/B/A CORT EVENT FURNISHINGS, DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. HEARING ON THE ISSUE OF THE RIGHT TO AMEND. ON ITS FACE C.C.P. SECTION 428.10 ALLOWS FOR THE FILING OF A CROSS-COMPLAINT BY ADAMS. HOWEVER, THE CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED RAISES CLAIMS THAT ARE VIRTUALLY IDENTICAL WITH THE COMPLAINT AND NAMES TWO INDIVIDUALS. IN EFFECT, ADAMS HAS USED C.C.P. SECTION 428.10 TO AVOID FILING A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CROSS-C0MPLAINT IS SUBJECT TO DEMURRER. THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE UNCERTAIN IN THAT IT IS IMPOSSIBLE TO TELL WHAT THE TERMS ARE OF THE ORAL CONTRACT AND WHICH CONTRACT OR CONTRACTS ARE BEING BREACHED. THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IS UNCERTAIN IN THAT IT FAILS TO ALLEGE WHAT EACH DEFENDANT DID AND WHEN. =(302/PJM/AY)
